creator: steven43126@gmail.com
text:
graphics/darktable fails to build due to not linking against libnotify.so

Linking C shared library libdarktable.so
[ 59%] Built target lib_darktable
Scanning dependencies of target darktable
[ 59%] Building C object src/CMakeFiles/darktable.dir/main.c.o
Linking C executable darktable
libdarktable.so: undefined reference to `inotify_add_watch'
libdarktable.so: undefined reference to `inotify_rm_watch'
libdarktable.so: undefined reference to `inotify_init'
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Install graphics/darktable from ports
